result: As an AI, I don’t have wants or desires. I don’t experience consciousness, emotions, or autonomy. I'm a program designed by humans to generate helpful, informative, and safe responses based on patterns in data. So, I don’t want anything—I simply function according to my design.

message.content: As an AI, I don’t have wants or desires. I don’t experience consciousness, emotions, or autonomy. I'm a program designed by humans to generate helpful, informative, and safe responses based on patterns in data. So, I don’t want anything—I simply function according to my design.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you want?
